title: Implement downward discovery for project/ directories
description: Walk filesystem downward from cwd to collect project/ directories. Stop descending into project/ directories. Remove upward-walking discovery and BEADS_DIR fallback.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented downward discovery in python/src/taskulus/project.py discover_project_directories and rust/src/file_io.rs discover_project_directories (skip project/ and project-local/ descent). Verified via features/project/project_utilities.feature and features/discovery/project_discovery.feature in behave and rust cucumber.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Discovery returns all project/ directories at or below cwd; no upward walking; BEADS_DIR fallback removed.
